 {"id":"bd-6tme.3","title":"E2E test: self-healing demo runs successfully and produces correct output","description":"# E2E test: self-healing demo runs successfully and produces correct output

## GOAL
E2E test for the Killer Demo epic (bd-6tme). Runs the demo script end-to-end and verifies the output format, repair correctness, and timing.

## TEST SCENARIO
1. Run `cargo run --bin ffs-demo -- self-healing` (or equivalent)
2. Verify exit code 0
3. Parse output: verify corruption count, repair count, verification pass
4. Verify: corrupted blocks == repaired blocks (zero data loss)
5. Verify: evidence ledger present and parseable
6. Verify: total time < 30 seconds

## ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
1. Demo runs without error
2. All corrupted blocks repaired
3. Output matches expected format
4. Timing within bounds
5. Deterministic with fixed seed","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BlueElm","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:30.417390920Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-18T22:27:41.312923975Z","closed_at":"2026-02-18T22:11:09.385271199Z","close_reason":"Completed: self-healing demo E2E harness passes with rch and validates output/repair/timing/determinism/evidence-ledger","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","e2e","selfhealing","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","depends_on_id":"bd-6tme","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:30.417390920Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","depends_on_id":"bd-6tme.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:03:52.365343179Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":149,"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien uplift contract (auto-applied via extreme-software-optimization + alien-artifact-coding + alien-graveyard).

Cluster: repair_durability
Mapped graveyard sections: 1.1 RaptorQ + 12.13 Change-point + 11.11 PoR
EV score: 25 (Impact*Confidence*Reuse / (Effort*Friction))
Priority tier: S/A
Budgeted mode: decode_budget_ms=200, io_budget_mb=64, max_repair_attempts=3
Fallback trigger: read-only degrade + evidence ledger + manual repair workflow

Required proof artifacts for execution on this bead:
- Baseline + hotspot evidence before changes.
- Isomorphism proof block per lever.
- Evidence-ledger event for decision path + fallback invocation.
- Repro pack: env.json, manifest.json, repro.lock (and LEGAL.md if IP risk appears).","created_at":"2026-02-13T23:09:23Z"},{"id":260,"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Validation evidence (2026-02-18): ran scripts/e2e/ffs_self_healing_demo.sh --rch and all phases passed. Key checks green: self_healing_demo_e2e (7 passed, 0 failed), demo::tests::demo_output_has_expected_shape (1 passed), self_heal_demo integration test (1 passed), summary confirms zero data loss, deterministic fixed seed behavior, evidence ledger parsing, and completion well under 30s per scenario timings. Script exit 0; total harness duration 304s due repeated remote sync overhead. Log: artifacts/e2e/20260218_170544_ffs_self_healing_demo/run.log.","created_at":"2026-02-18T22:11:05Z"},{"id":261,"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CloudyEagle taking sub-slice: implement  binary command path () + E2E binary execution assertions + README/script alignment; coordinating with BlueElm in Agent Mail thread bd-6tme.3.","created_at":"2026-02-18T22:11:08Z"},{"id":262,"issue_id":"bd-6tme.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"CloudyEagle sub-slice complete: added concrete binary target ffs-demo (crates/ffs-repair/src/bin/ffs-demo.rs + Cargo.toml [[bin]]), added integration assertion that executes CARGO_BIN_EXE_ffs-demo with self-healing in crates/ffs-repair/tests/self_healing_demo_e2e.rs, updated scripts/e2e/ffs_self_healing_demo.sh phase flow to explicitly run cargo run -p ffs-repair --bin ffs-demo -- self-healing, and updated README quick example to the same command. Validation (all via rch): cargo fmt --check, cargo check --workspace --all-targets, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo test -p ffs-repair --test self_healing_demo_e2e -- --nocapture, full scripts/e2e/ffs_self_healing_demo.sh --rch PASS, and direct cargo run -p ffs-repair --bin ffs-demo -- self-healing PASS.","created_at":"2026-02-18T22:27:41Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-6u9o","title":"Add FUSE E2E tests for extended attributes (xattr) operations","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T05:42:45.817807365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T05:49:46.103841915Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T05:49:46.103822679Z","close_reason":"Added 6 xattr E2E tests: set/get/list/remove, multiple attrs, overwrite, directory xattrs, nonexistent get, nonexistent remove","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fuse","testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-6ut5x","title":"fuzz: add fuzz_repair_codec_roundtrip target","description":"ffs_repair codec encode_group/decode_group roundtrip fuzzing","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T11:48:45.500525225Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T22:30:10Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T22:30:10Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-6wzug","title":"[FUSE] FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR ioctl — chattr -p / xfs_io fsxattr read-side parity","description":"FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR (0x801c5821) returns struct fsxattr (28 bytes) with the inode's project ID, extent count, and chattr-style flags mapped to xflags bits. Used by xfs_io, chattr -p, and lsattr -p. dispatch_ioctl currently has no handler so the call surfaces ENOTTY through the FUSE mount. Implement read-side (FSGETXATTR); SETXATTR can land separately. Map ext4 inode.flags -> xflags per uapi/linux/fs.h: EXT4_IMMUTABLE_FL=0x10 -> FS_XFLAG_IMMUTABLE=0x8, EXT4_APPEND_FL=0x20 -> FS_XFLAG_APPEND=0x10, EXT4_SYNC_FL=0x8 -> FS_XFLAG_SYNC=0x20, EXT4_NOATIME_FL=0x80 -> FS_XFLAG_NOATIME=0x40, EXT4_NODUMP_FL=0x40 -> FS_XFLAG_NODUMP=0x80, EXT4_PROJINHERIT_FL=0x20000000 -> FS_XFLAG_PROJINHERIT=0x200, EXT4_NODEFRAG_FL=0x4000000 -> FS_XFLAG_NODEFRAG=0x2000. fsx_projid from Ext4Inode.projid; fsx_nextents from collect_extents().len(). Acceptance: ioctl(fd, FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR, &out) on a regular file returns 28 bytes with correct projid and xflags reflecting the chattr state.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-25T15:00:51.770114020Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T15:11:42.727971085Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T15:11:42.726056944Z","close_reason":"FS_IOC_FSGETXATTR shipped end-to-end via FsxattrInfo + xflags module + FsOps::get_inode_fsxattr trait method + OpenFs override + ext4_flags_to_xflags helper + dispatch_ioctl branch + encode_fsxattr_response. 5 regressions: 28-byte LE encoding, EINVAL on short buffer, default-zero xflags, IMMUTABLE|APPEND|SYNC mapping with HASATTR set, nextents climbs from 0 to >=1 after write. SETXATTR (write side) deferred.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-70qlo","title":"model jbd2 async_commit checksum semantics","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-20T19:45:48.404942573Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T19:47:54.785002536Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T19:47:54.782735906Z","close_reason":"Modeled JBD2 async_commit checksum semantics","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-72z0r","title":"fuzz: add fuzz_native_cow_recovery target for recover_native_cow and replay_native_cow","description":"ffs_journal::recover_native_cow (lib.rs:1859) and replay_native_cow (lib.rs:1922) accept raw block data but have no fuzz coverage.

Create fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_native_cow_recovery.rs to exercise both functions with crash oracle + determinism checks.

Acceptance: fuzz target passes cargo fuzz build and covers both native COW recovery paths.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T11:35:45.255933427Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T22:41:30Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T22:41:30Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-78sz","title":"Implement ext4 inline data read support","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-22T18:11:55.703345481Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-22T18:12:08.299466470Z","closed_at":"2026-03-22T18:12:08.298942226Z","close_reason":"Implemented ext4 inline data read support: (1) Added read_ext4_inline_data() method that reads file content from inode extent_bytes (60 bytes) + xattr_ibody continuation. (2) Added inline data check in FsOps::read() ext4 path — checks EXT4_INLINE_DATA_FL before extent tree resolution. (3) Removed INLINE_DATA from REJECTED_V1 incompat set so images with inline data can mount. 471 ffs-core + 360 ffs-ondisk tests pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ext4","inline_data","parity"]}
